heading: Foreign Operations Administration unaffected
label: 1768 Foreign Operations Administration unaffected
text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to affect personnel employed by or funds available to the Foreign Operations Administration or programs conducted under its authorities.
notes: Transfer of FunctionsThe Foreign Operations Administration was abolished by Ex. Ord. No. 10610 of , and its functions and offices were transferred to the Department of State and to the Department of Defense, effective .May 9, 1955June 30, 1955
